subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qábl-i-Ridá! Hearken thou unto the Voice of Him Who is wronged. Verily, there is no God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل رضا ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم انت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions
